org.docgene.model.globals

Class ArticlesCategories

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.docgene.model.globals.ArticlesCategories
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    org.docgene.model.globals.PackagedElement, org.docgene.model.globals.RootElement, org.docgene.model.globals.XMLRootElement, HTMLOutput

    public class ArticlesCategories
extends java.lang.Object
implements HTMLOutput, org.docgene.model.globals.XMLRootElement
    Represents the articles categories.
